Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: costume groupings [300210821], object groupings by specific context [300241512], object groupings [300241507], Object Groupings and Systems (hierarchy name) [300241489], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: accessories by location above the waist [300211602], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Matched sets of ornaments intended to be worn together, either jewels or trimmings for costume, usually a collar and cuffs.
Úsese para conjuntos de ornamentos que hacen juego con la intención de ser usados en conjunto, tanto joyas o adornos para vestuario, usualmente collares y pulseras.
Te gebruiken voor bij elkaar horende versieringen bedoeld om samen te worden gedragen, bestaande uit juwelen of garneersels voor kleding, gewoonlijk op boord en manchetten.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Abgestimmtes Set von Schmuckstücken, die dazu gedacht sind, zusammen getragen zu werden; entweder Schmuck oder Besatz für Kleidung, dann oft ein Halskragen und Manschetten.
專供成套穿戴的飾品組，為珠寶首飾或飾物，常見於衣領及袖口處。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
